claims.summary: Rolling entropy evidence lacked the direction of change across its bounded window.
claims.disposition: Implemented additive rolling_spectral_entropy_change and rolling_spectral_entropy_trend_state fields using latest finite minus earliest finite entropy.

claims.summary: Initial entropy and rolling entropy should remain distinguishable.
claims.disposition: Verified separate first-valid, sample-count, mean, variance, range, change, and trend fields with legacy defaults.

claims.summary: Jitter may precede pressure or mode-packing changes.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded temporal comparison; current evidence cannot establish precursor causation.

claims.summary: Entropy direction must not be mistaken for a felt-state or control signal.
claims.disposition: Implemented an explicit basis excluding cadence, felt state, causation, and control; no live consumer reads the new fields.
